hr_policies.title: Paid Time Off Policy
hr_policies.content: All full-time employees receive 20 days of paid time off (PTO) per calendar year, accrued at 1.67 days per month. PTO can be used for vacation, personal days, or mental health days. Unused PTO carries over up to a maximum of 5 days into the next calendar year. Requests must be submitted at least 2 weeks in advance for periods of 3+ days. Manager approval is required. During company-wide blackout periods (last 2 weeks of December), PTO may be limited based on business needs.

hr_policies.title: Remote Work Policy
hr_policies.content: Employees may work remotely full-time or in a hybrid arrangement with manager approval. Remote employees must maintain a dedicated workspace, reliable internet connection (minimum 25 Mbps), and be available during core hours (10 AM - 3 PM in their local time zone). A one-time $500 home office stipend is provided for new remote employees. Remote employees are expected to attend in-person team events (company covers travel costs) at least once per quarter. VPN must be used when accessing company systems from public networks.

hr_policies.title: Code of Conduct
hr_policies.content: All employees, contractors, and interns are expected to maintain professional and respectful conduct at all times. This includes in-person interactions, virtual meetings, Slack communications, and external representations of the company. Harassment, discrimination, and retaliation of any kind are strictly prohibited and will result in disciplinary action up to and including termination. Employees are encouraged to report concerns to their manager, HR, or the anonymous ethics hotline. All reports will be investigated promptly and confidentially.

hr_policies.title: Expense Reimbursement Policy
hr_policies.content: Business expenses must be submitted within 30 days of incurrence via Expensify. Receipts are required for all expenses over $25. Manager approval is required for expenses over $500. Pre-approval is required for travel, conferences, and any single expense over $1,000. Meals during business travel are reimbursed up to $75/day. Reimbursements are processed within 10 business days of approval. Personal expenses submitted as business expenses will result in disciplinary action.

hr_policies.title: Information Security Policy
hr_policies.content: All employees must complete security awareness training within 30 days of hire and annually thereafter. Passwords must be a minimum of 14 characters and use multi-factor authentication (MFA) on all company accounts. Sharing credentials is strictly prohibited. Company devices must have full-disk encryption enabled. Sensitive data (customer PII, financial records, source code) must never be stored on personal devices or shared via unapproved channels. Security incidents must be reported to security@company.com within 1 hour of discovery.

hr_policies.title: Parental Leave Policy
hr_policies.content: Primary caregivers receive 16 weeks of fully paid parental leave. Secondary caregivers receive 8 weeks of fully paid parental leave. Leave can be taken consecutively or split into two blocks within 12 months of the birth or adoption. Employees must notify HR at least 8 weeks before the expected start of leave. Benefits continue unchanged during parental leave. A gradual return-to-work schedule (4-day weeks for the first month back) is available upon request.
